project.name: REAREye
project.description:
This is an Xposed module for enhancing the rear screen of Xiaomi 17 series phones.

We’ve also created an organization to manage the personalized widgets and enhancement modules uploaded by the community.

This device series boasts over three million users who, after unlocking their devices, can install our modules to further personalize and customize their rear screens. We currently have over 1k users.

Many widget developers have already uploaded their creations to our platform, allowing users to quickly install these widgets onto their devices. Our community is actively recruiting more widget developers to join us.

The core source code repository for this project is currently still hosted on my personal account, but community-related source code and repositories are hosted on the organization’s account.

We are gradually expanding the possibilities this module offers creators.

This project already provides creators with custom widgets, custom cards, custom wallpapers, and route management for notification transition widgets, building upon the original functionality.

Creators can use these features to add their own designed widgets, cards, or app-specific notifications to the rear screen.

We are currently planning to develop a Lua script-based content provider system. This project will allow creators to retrieve data from various data sources by writing Lua scripts and pass it into the components and cards they create.

I have always believed that the work we are doing is meaningful, giving devices created for emotional value greater practicality. We are maintaining an active development pace, striving to bring users more interesting and useful new features.
